content_body: Our last day! This has been our first experience in a log cabin in Georgia and we have really enjoyed the peace and tranquility. The sauna and hot tub have been key favorites so we especially appreciated the volume of towels available. The equipment and general ambience of the place added to relaxation. We gave our family in U.K. a tour on-line. They were truly amazed, too. Hopefully we will be able to return with a few more family members. Many thanks for the hospitality. The directions were great.
title: Tranquil North Georgia Mountain Vacation
